meaning: n.步态竞赛(旧时美国南部地区黑人的一种娱乐,因对步法及姿势优美者奖以蛋糕而得名),一种步态舞vi.举行步态竞赛
examples: The album was all recorded in 24-bit digital to a hard disc system utilizing Cakewalk Sonar software as the main recording tool.
Doing my exams was a cakewalk this semester.
For him, it's a cakewalk-a vegan-friendly cakewalk, naturally.
Elmore says the battle for Fallujah made the initial invasion look like a cakewalk.
Ingratiation is no cakewalk for entrepreneurs because they are so solidly wedded to their convictions.
